parameters.content:
## SA_File_Upload Workflow

Sub-workflow called by SA_Personal_Assistant when user uploads a file in chat.

### Accepts:
- userID: User's UUID
- file_url: Supabase storage public URL
- file_name: Original filename (e.g. report.pdf)
- file_type: Extension (e.g. pdf, txt, docx)
- category: KB category (default: documents)

### Supported file types:
PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, JSON (all extracted by backend)

### Flow:
1. Receive inputs from parent workflow
2. Call backend /api/file/extract-text → returns pre-chunked text
3. Output one item per chunk
4. Generate embedding per chunk (OpenRouter text-embedding-3-small)
5. INSERT each chunk into user_vector_knowledge_base (Neon)
6. Return success response with chunk count

### Chunking:
- Backend splits at ~1500 chars with 200 char overlap
- Each chunk = separate DB row with its own embedding
- Handles large PDFs safely (no token limit issues)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.user_vector_knowledge_base (user_id, document, category, embedding, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Process File Chunks').item.json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Process File Chunks').item.json.document.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  '{{ $('Process File Chunks').item.json.category }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}',
  '{{ $('Process File Chunks').item.json.source }}'
)
RETURNING id;
